pipeline.surfacesNotSynchronized: Analysis complete - GitHub check not synchronized
pipeline.surfacesNotSynchronizedDetail: Scan results are saved; the GitHub Check Run will appear after publishing completes.
pipeline.outputNotVerified: These results could not be verified
actions.failureBody: Analysis could not be completed. Check the workflow logs for details.
actions.demoSummaryBanner: Sample analysis only - not production MergeSignal results. Do not use for merge decisions.
actions.trustedWorkflowSecretMissing: Trusted MergeSignal analysis is unavailable in this repository. Complete engine access setup, then re-run the workflow.
actions.trustedCompositeTokenMissing: Trusted analysis is unavailable: engine access was not provided to this workflow run.
actions.trustedEngineRepoLayoutInvalid: MergeSignal could not prepare the analysis engine (unsupported project layout).
actions.trustedEngineBuildOutputMissing: MergeSignal could not prepare the analysis engine (expected build output was not found).
actions.trustedSummaryStubBlocked: Trusted analysis is unavailable: output did not meet verification requirements.
actions.trustedMethodologyMissing: Trusted analysis is unavailable: verified analysis metadata was missing.
actions.trustedMethodologyPolicyMismatch: Trusted analysis is unavailable: methodology output did not match the configured policy.
actions.trustedAuditEnvInvalid: Trusted analysis verification could not run in this environment.
actions.trustedSummaryVerificationFailed: MergeSignal could not verify this summary for trusted analysis.
actions.prAnalysisUnavailableFork: MergeSignal analysis is not available for this pull request (fork PRs use a restricted CI context).
actions.prAnalysisUnavailableDependabot: MergeSignal analysis is not available for automated dependency update PRs in this CI context.
actions.pushTrustedScanSkippedNoEngineTo: Trusted MergeSignal analysis was skipped because no engine access token is configured for this repository.
actions.trustedWorkflowCredentialHintBod: The engine checkout token was not available to this workflow run. Add it under this repository's Actions secrets, or grant this repository access to an organization secret. Secrets that exist only on a GitHub Environment are not available here unless this job declares that environment.
actions.riskIndexDirectionShort: 0 = lowest merge risk, 100 = highest merge risk
actions.mergePostureUnavailableDetail: This scan did not include a merge posture verdict; use the risk index as a coarse signal only.
actions.supportingGraphContextNote: Supporting context - not a merge verdict by itself.
actions.layerScoreGlossary: *Higher column scores = more risk in that dimension (0 best ??? 100 worst).*
actions.vulnerableReviewerHint: If vulnerable packages are listed, confirm they apply to your usage before treating counts as merge blockers.
checkRun.baselineOutcomePrimary: No actionable dependency concerns showed up for this PR in this scan.
checkRun.baselineOutcomeScope: This run emphasizes repository-wide context; open the scan for PR-specific detail when available.
checkRun.baselineBoundaryNote: PR-targeted dependency signals are not included in baseline-only runs.
checkRun.layerNoDrivers: No notable drivers surfaced for this dimension.
scanDetail.codeIntelligenceUnavailable: Application usage was not analyzed for this scan
scanDetail.topologyCollapsedHint: Supporting detail - graph paths and depth
scanDetail.verdictLine.safeNoBlockersMod: No merge blockers - moderate dependency footprint
scanDetail.verdictLine.safeNoBlockersWid: No merge blockers - wide upgrade footprint
scanDetail.verdictLine.reviewBeforeMerge: Review before merge - moderate dependency footprint
Review before merge - wide dependency footprint
scanDetail.verdictLine.riskyResolveNarro: Resolve blockers before merge - focused footprint
scanDetail.verdictLine.riskyResolveModer: Resolve blockers before merge - moderate dependency footprint
scanDetail.verdictLine.riskyResolveWide: Resolve blockers before merge - wide transitive tree
scanDetail.tier1Fallback.lightweightPr: This PR has limited code-change signal. MergeSignal reviewed dependency structure; no runtime-impact indicators detected.
scanDetail.tier1Fallback.structuralProof: No runtime-impact indicators detected. Dependency risks, if any, are listed in proof below.
scanDetail.tier1Fallback.structuralCompl: Dependency structure assessed. No application-specific behavior changes identified for this PR.
scanDetail.confidenceCaveat.low: Limited signal - treat this as directional
scanDetail.codeAnalysisTimeout: Code analysis timed out - runtime impact may be incomplete
scanDetail.recommendationDetail.selectPr: Select a recommendation to understand it
scanDetail.recommendationDetail.defaultW: This recommendation addresses a structural dependency pattern detected in this scan.
This scan surfaced dependency patterns worth addressing before or after merge.
scanDetail.recommendationDetail.defaultB: Reduced merge risk and easier dependency management.
scanDetail.recommendationDetail.insightB: Restores predictable runtime behavior and prevents regressions after merge.
scanDetail.recommendationDetail.security: Reduced vulnerability exposure before code reaches production.
scanDetail.recommendationScanContext.qui: MergeSignal reviewed this upgrade. No merge blockers or runtime-impact indicators detected.
scanDetail.recommendationScanContext.nee: MergeSignal reviewed dependency structure for this upgrade. Review the items below before merging.
scanDetail.recommendationScanContext.ris: MergeSignal detected blockers in this upgrade. Resolve the priorities below before merging.
scanDetail.recommendationScanContext.lig: This PR has limited code-change signal. MergeSignal reviewed dependency structure for structural risks.
Dependency structure looks stable for this upgrade scope.
No merge blockers or runtime-impact indicators were detected for this PR.
Low-friction merge with minimal follow-up work.
Even quiet upgrades accumulate semver drift over time.
Proactive cleanup keeps future upgrades cheaper as the tree evolves.
Easier dependency management on the next upgrade cycle.
Dependency health is stable now but benefits from ongoing observation.
Monitoring catches regressions that appear only after merge.
Earlier detection of dependency regressions in production.
Wide upgrade footprints warrant a quick sanity check before merge.
This upgrade touches enough packages to validate affected paths once.
More predictable merges with fewer surprise runtime interactions.
Structural dependency signals warrant a focused review before merge.
This scan surfaced dependency risks that deserve a pre-merge pass.
Lower chance of shipping hidden dependency regressions.
Limited code-change signal means dependency structure carries most of the review burden.
MergeSignal reviewed the lockfile graph because PR code signal was lightweight.
Confidence that structural changes are understood before merge.
Transitive paths can hide behavior changes behind a small direct diff.
Affected dependency paths in this scan exceed a narrow footprint.
Clearer understanding of what this upgrade actually touches.
Transitive changes can surface only after merge in integrated environments.
This upgrade shifts transitive dependencies that are worth watching post-merge.
Earlier detection if transitive changes cause regressions.
Blockers must be resolved before this upgrade is safe to merge.
This scan flagged issues that exceed acceptable merge risk.
Safer merge with blockers addressed before release.
Known vulnerabilities in the dependency tree can reach production through this upgrade.
Vulnerable packages are reachable from packages changed in this PR.
Reduced vulnerability exposure before code reaches production.
Fixes can change the dependency graph and scan conclusions.
Re-run after addressing blockers to confirm the upgrade is safe.
Verified merge posture after remediation.
Critical or high-severity findings block a safe merge posture.
This scan flagged findings that must be addressed before merge.
Safer merge with critical issues resolved first.
presentation.limitedContextHeadline: Dependency upgrade with limited scan context
presentation.limitedContextKeyPoint: PR-specific intelligence was limited for this scan
presentation.multiRuntimeHeadline: Multiple runtime dependency upgrades need review
presentation.buildOnlyHeadline: {package} patch upgrade with limited application impact
presentation.limitedEvidenceKeyPoint: Evidence for this upgrade is limited
presentation.verifyErrorResponses: Check error responses and status codes
cli.stderrOutputNotVerified: These results could not be verified.
engineLoader.implRequiredTrustedScan: Trusted analysis requires a configured analysis engine. Use demo output only when you explicitly intend to run without a real engine.
engineLoader.implRequiredProduction: A configured analysis engine is required in this environment. Use demo output only when you explicitly intend to run without a real engine.
